tasks.title: Init should fail fast on invalid config JSON instead of marking valid
evidence: crates/ralph/src/init_cmd.rs write_config returns FileInitStatus::Valid even when serde_json::from_str::<Config> fails.
plan: Return an error or reinitialize when config JSON is invalid and --force is not set.
Add tests to ensure invalid config files are detected.
Update CLI/help/docs if behavior changes.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Init should validate existing queue/done contents, not only parse JSON
evidence: crates/ralph/src/init_cmd.rs write_queue/write_done only load JSON without running queue::validate_queue, so structurally invalid tasks pass init validation.
plan: Run queue validation on existing queue/done files during init when not forcing.
Surface clear errors when invariants fail.
Add tests covering invalid queue/done inputs.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Handle TUI event loop errors instead of panicking
evidence: crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs uses unwrap() for event::read, now_utc_rfc3339, and handle_key_event in the main loop, which can panic and leave the terminal in raw mode.
plan: Replace unwrap calls with error propagation and ensure terminal cleanup on failure.
Add tests or integration coverage to confirm graceful error handling.
Verify TUI exits cleanly after an injected error.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Update TUI title edits to set updated_at
evidence: crates/ralph/src/tui/events.rs handle_editing_mode_key ignores now_rfc3339 and App::update_title does not set updated_at, so edits don't update timestamps.
plan: Thread now_rfc3339 into title update and set updated_at when the title changes.
Add/adjust tests to assert updated_at changes on edit.
Ensure no regressions in TUI edit flows.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Include request/custom_fields/tags/scope in queue search
evidence: crates/ralph/src/queue/search.rs matches only title/evidence/plan/notes; request, tags, scope, and custom_fields are ignored.
plan: Decide which additional fields should be searchable (request, tags, scope, custom_fields) and update search logic.
Update CLI help/docs to reflect the expanded search surface.
Add tests covering matches in the newly included fields.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Regex search should honor --match-case
evidence: crates/ralph/src/queue/search.rs builds Regex::new(query) without considering the match_case flag, so regex searches are always case-sensitive.
plan: Switch to RegexBuilder and set case_insensitive when match_case is false.
Add tests verifying case-insensitive regex behavior.
Update CLI help text if needed.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Validate sort-by values and use enum for list/sort
evidence: crates/ralph/src/cli/queue.rs list sort_by ignores unknown values (falls back to unsorted) and sort_by is a free-form String in both list and sort commands.
plan: Introduce a ValueEnum for sort_by (e.g., priority) and use it in list and sort commands.
Ensure invalid values are rejected by clap with clear errors.
Update docs/tests for the new enum-based sort flags.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Default queue sort should put highest priority first
evidence: crates/ralph/src/cli/queue.rs QueueSortArgs defaults descending=false, so ralph queue sort orders lowest priority first unless --descending is provided.
plan: Decide the default ordering (likely highest-first) and adjust defaults/flags accordingly.
Update CLI help/examples and tests to match the new default.
Verify sorting behavior in queue sort and list.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Align config schema phases constraints with runtime validation
evidence: schemas/config.schema.json allows agent.phases minimum 0 while crates/ralph/src/config.rs rejects any value outside 1..=3.
plan: Update config schema to restrict phases to 1, 2, or 3 (enum or min/max).
Regenerate schema and update docs/examples.
Add tests to ensure schema and validation stay aligned.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Add missing module docstrings to core files
evidence: crates/ralph/src/config.rs, crates/ralph/src/lib.rs, crates/ralph/src/init_cmd.rs, and crates/ralph/src/scan_cmd.rs lack top-of-file //! module docstrings.
AGENTS.md requires every code file to have a docstring describing its purpose.
plan: Add concise module-level docstrings to the missing files.
Keep descriptions consistent with existing module docs.
Verify linting/tests still pass.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Treat rejected tasks as terminal in queue stats
evidence: crates/ralph/src/reports.rs computes completion rate using status==Done only, so rejected tasks are counted as active.
plan: Decide whether rejected should count as completed (terminal) and update stats logic.
Adjust output text to reflect the new definition.
Add tests for completion rate and active counts with rejected tasks.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.
